title: Theta
description: A minimalistic Wynncraft & Wynntils UI resource pack inspired by leaked Bedrock concepts, designed for distraction-free end-game gameplay
body:
### ⚠️ This pack requires Wynntils with custom bars and info boxes enabled.
### Theta removes Wynncraft's built-in health, mana, and coordinate displays in favor of Wynntils' more flexible alternatives. If you're not comfortable configuring Wynntils custom HUD elements, this pack may not be for you

## About Θ
Theta is a clean, minimalistic resource pack inspired by leaked Mojang Bedrock UI concepts. Originally created for end-game Wynncraft players who prefer essential functionality over some useless visuals, Theta changes both Wynncraft and Wynntils interfaces so it wont be distracting.

## What Does It Change?
- Complete "overhaul" of Wynncraft's default GUI elements
- Minimalistic redesign of menus, HUD elements, and interface components
- Custom emoji and symbol replacements for enhanced accessibility
